sourcesContent:
import React from "react";

/**
 * MetaIcons - A collection of SVG icons styled like Meta's design system
 */
const MetaIcons = {
  /**
   * Arrow Right icon in Meta's style
   */
  ArrowRight: (props) => (
    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" {...props}>
      <path
        d="M8 2.94L13.06 8L8 13.06"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
      <path
        d="M13.06 8L2.94 8"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
    </svg>
  ),
  
  /**
   * Chevron Right icon in Meta's style
   */
  ChevronRight: (props) => (
    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" {...props}>
      <path
        d="M6 3L11 8L6 13"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
    </svg>
  ),
  
  /**
   * Play icon in Meta's style
   */
  Play: (props) => (
    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" {...props}>
      <path
        d="M5 3.5L12 8L5 12.5V3.5Z"
        fill="currentColor"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
    </svg>
  ),
  
  /**
   * External Link icon in Meta's style
   */
  ExternalLink: (props) => (
    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" {...props}>
      <path
        d="M12 8.5V12.5C12 12.7652 11.8946 13.0196 11.7071 13.2071C11.5196 13.3946 11.2652 13.5 11 13.5H4C3.73478 13.5 3.48043 13.3946 3.29289 13.2071C3.10536 13.0196 3 12.7652 3 12.5V5.5C3 5.23478 3.10536 4.98043 3.29289 4.79289C3.48043 4.60536 3.73478 4.5 4 4.5H8"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
      <path
        d="M10 2.5H13V5.5"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
      <path
        d="M6.5 9L13 2.5"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
    </svg>
  ),
  
  /**
   * Download icon in Meta's style
   */
  Download: (props) => (
    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" {...props}>
      <path
        d="M3 11V12.5C3 12.7652 3.10536 13.0196 3.29289 13.2071C3.48043 13.3946 3.73478 13.5 4 13.5H12C12.2652 13.5 12.5196 13.3946 12.7071 13.2071C12.8946 13.0196 13 12.7652 13 12.5V11"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
      <path
        d="M8 10L8 2.5"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
      <path
        d="M5 7L8 10L11 7"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      />
    </svg>
  )
};

export default MetaIcons;
